jobs.title: Car Mechanic
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobs.meta_description: Eezy henkilöstöpalvelut Oy is seeking a car mechanic in Seinäjoki for long-term employment as a full-time employee (37.5 hours per week). Join our modern
jobs.description: We are looking for a car mechanic in Seinäjoki to join our team at Eezy henkilöstöpalvelut Oy. With automotive training and a self-driven approach, you'll be part of a modern multi-brand repair shop where you can work long-term as a full-time employee (37.5 hours per week). We offer competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements and provide opportunities for career growth through ongoing education and experience in the automotive industry. Our friendly and competent team will support your development, and we'll match your salary to the TES of the workshop industry. If you're ready to learn new things and develop your skills while working with a motivated and energetic team, apply now by submitting your application via the provided link.
what_we_expect: At least a basic degree in the automotive industry or a similar education
Want to learn new things and develop your skills
Active and energetic attitude
job_responsibilities: Duties of a basic car mechanic at a multi-brand repair shop
At least a basic degree in the automotive industry or a similar education
Want to learn new things and develop your skills
what_we_offer: The possibility of a longer employment relationship
The support of a friendly and competent team
Salary in accordance with the TES of the workshop industry
jobs.search_keywords: car mechanic, Seinäjoki, automotive training, self-initiated approach, long-term work, multi-brand repair shop

jobs.title: Excavator driver.
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements and other company and links
jobs.meta_description: Maanrakennus Huuskonen Oy, Toivakka is seeking a Excavator driver. in Jyväskylä. We are looking for a motivated and independent machine operator with experience
jobs.description: We are looking for a motivated and independent machine operator with experience in renovation projects to join our young team at Maanrakennus Huuskonen Oy, Jyväskylä. The excavator driver will primarily be responsible for operating heavy construction machinery independently, making minor repairs, and keeping equipment in good condition. This role requires careful and systematic work on the site. Submit a free-form application by email to teemu@maanrakennushuuskonen.fi or call 0400 748594. The position will be filled as soon as a suitable candidate is found, with the best time to reach out being weekdays from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. Photos of your own work are desirable.
what_we_expect: Motivated and independent machine operator
Experience in renovation projects considered an advantage
Ability to work carefully and systematically on the site
job_responsibilities: Excavator driver duties
Renovation projects experience required
Carefully and systematically work on the site
what_we_offer: Position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found
Best time to reach out by phone is weekdays from 7 a.m. To 6 p.m
Photos of the products of your own work desirable

jobs.title: IVF laboratory nurse
jobs.salary_range: Salary is determined by basic education and wor
jobs.meta_description: Ovumia Oy seeks a skilled Embryologist (Laboratory Technician) for their Helsinki clinic as part of a dedicated team, joining as a full-time, permanent
jobs.description: Ovumia is seeking a skilled Embryologist (Laboratory Technician) for their Helsinki clinic, joining our dedicated team as a full-time, permanent position. This role involves critical tasks in the IVF laboratory, including oocyte processing and freezing, embryo cultivation, selection, and reporting. Ideal candidates possess relevant education, experience in an IVF setting, strong embryology skills, and adherence to quality systems and standard operating procedures (SOPs). The salary is determined by basic education and work experience, with a competitive hourly rate based on Finnish collective agreements. We offer a responsible and versatile job description that aligns closely with the needs of our patients, working in an innovative international environment.
what_we_expect: Suitable education (e.g. Bioanalyst/laboratory nurse)
Experience in IVF laboratory work
Good knowledge of embryology and aseptic working
Experience working in a quality system and following SOP instructions
Accuracy, flexibility and ability to work in changing situations
Excellent teamwork skills
job_responsibilities: The tasks of the andrology laboratory
Oocyte processing and freezing (vitrification)
Cultivation, classification, selection and freezing of embryos
IVF and ICSI procedures
Documentation and reporting
Cooperation with the treatment team and patient communication
what_we_offer: A responsible and versatile job description and the opportunity to develop as an expert in the fertility treatment laboratory
Salary is determined by basic education and work experience
jobs.search_keywords: IVF laboratory nurse, IVF laboratory technician, fertility treatment laboratory, embryo processing, aseptic working, quality system, patient care chain

jobs.title: Chef
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobs.meta_description: JLY Ravintola Oy, Riihimäki seeks a skilled Chef to join our team. This position offers competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements and
jobs.description: We are looking for a skilled Chef to join our team at JLY Ravintola Oy, Riihimäki. This position offers competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements and comes with language requirements in both Chinese (Zh) and Finnish. The Chef will be responsible for cleaning the food preparation area, maintaining a clean, hygienic, and safe working environment, using correct temperature settings on kitchen appliances, storing supplies properly, and employing cooking techniques to prepare dishes. This role requires proficiency in handling raw materials with food safety practices and managing daily kitchen activities independently. A background in Chinese cuisine is preferred but not required. The Chef will also cooperate with other kitchen staff members.
what_we_expect: Cleans the food preparation area
Maintains a clean, hygienic and safe working environment
Use food cutting tools
Take care of the correct temperature of the kitchen appliances
Store kitchen supplies
Use cooking techniques
job_responsibilities: Prepare a menu of Asian dishes
Handle raw materials in a food hygiene manner
Manage the kitchen independently
Take care of daily cleanliness of the kitchen
Cooperate with other kitchen staff
what_we_offer: Chef Profession Chuancai an Asian chef who can independently prepare a menu of Asian dishes foods.
Can handle raw materials in a food hygiene manner and can manage the kitchen independently daily activities.
Takes care of the daily cleanliness of the kitchen.
To do cooperation with other kitchen staff.
jobs.search_keywords: Chef, Asian chef, menu preparation, raw materials handling, food hygiene, kitchen management, cleaning, cooperation

jobs.title: IVF biologist
jobs.salary_range: Salary is determined by basic education and wor
jobs.meta_description: Ovumia Oy seeks a full-time IVF biologist in Helsinki for their fertility clinic. Strong embryology skills and relevant education are required. Apply now by
jobs.description: Ovumia is seeking a full-time, permanent IVF biologist for their Helsinki clinic. This role involves working closely with the treatment team in both the embryo and andrology laboratories, processing frozen semen, performing laboratory analyses on fertility, examining cell samples under a microscope, and documenting and reporting results. The ideal candidate should have relevant education (e.g., biologist, biotechnologist), experience in IVF laboratories, and strong embryology skills. Salary is determined by basic education and work experience. The start will be agreed separately, with the task filling as soon as a suitable person is found. Interested applicants should apply to hakemeet@ovumia.fi with the title "IVF biologist".
what_we_expect: Suitable education (e.g. Biologist, biotechnologist, biotechnology engineer)
Experience in IVF laboratory work
Good knowledge of embryology and aseptic working
Experience working in a quality system and following SOP instructions
Accuracy, flexibility and ability to work in changing situations
Excellent teamwork skills
job_responsibilities: The tasks of the andrology laboratory
Oocyte processing and freezing (vitrification)
Cultivation, classification, selection and freezing of embryos
IVF and ICSI procedures
Documentation and reporting
Cooperation with the treatment team and patient communication
what_we_offer: A responsible and versatile job description and the opportunity to develop as an expert in the fertility treatment laboratory
Salary is determined by basic education and work experience
The start will be agreed separately, and the task will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found
